name: react-devtools-core
description: Empty stub. Ink imports react-devtools-core inside a `if (process.env.DEV === 'true')` guard. Bun's --compile bundler eagerly resolves the static import inside the guarded `./devtools.js`, so without this stub the compiled binary fails at startup with `Cannot find package 'react-devtools-core'`. Wired via pnpm.overrides in the root package.json.
